tools.name: lu_load_protocol
tools.description: Load and parse a Lingua Universale protocol. Must be called before verify_message or check_properties. Returns parsed protocol summary with roles, steps, and properties.

protocol_text.description: The .lu protocol source text to load

tools.name: lu_verify_message
tools.description: Verify whether a message is valid in the context of an ongoing session. Requires lu_load_protocol to have been called first. Replays the existing message history against the protocol, then checks whether next_message is the expected next step.

messages.description: List of already-sent messages, each with sender, receiver, action

next_message.description: The message to validate, same format as messages

tools.name: lu_check_properties
tools.description: Check all declared properties of a protocol. Returns PROVED or VIOLATED for each property with evidence.

tools.name: lu_list_templates
tools.description: List available protocol templates from the standard library. Optionally filter by category.

category.description: Filter by category (communication, data, business, ai_ml, security)
